Oscillators help identify reversal areas by showing when markets become overbought or oversold. Which of the following indicators belong to which group? 1. Moving average 2. MACD-Histogram 3. Stochastic 4. MACD-Lines 5. Force Index A.

Uptrend 2. Downtrend 3. Bullish divergence 4. Bearish divergence 5. Price tail And for extra credit: At the right edge of the chart, bullish, bearish, or neutral? Please explain. Question 34—Force Index Which of the following phrases does not apply to Force Index?
